articles.headline: Knicks win the NBA title; Mayor Mamdani announces a ticker-tape parade
articles.summary: The Knicks beat the Spurs in Game 5 of the Finals on June 13; the city is planning a Canyon of Heroes parade and City Hall ceremony.

articles.headline: World Cup fills the NY/NJ stadium as transit and security expand
articles.summary: Brazil-Morocco, France-Senegal and more draw huge crowds; Gov. Hochul and the host committee tout free fan events and beefed-up transit.

articles.headline: State primary set for June 23 amid fights over rent and the subway
articles.summary: Housing affordability, rent stabilization and subway reliability are the defining issues heading into the June 23 primary.

articles.headline: Trump touts an initial agreement to end the war in Iran
articles.summary: A national breakthrough on the Iran conflict that had shaken the global economy.
